calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2004 Off Calendar

Notice For Apportionment Proceeding And Order To Distribute Settlement Funds;
Off Calendar Jan-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Apportionment of Settlement Funds hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Dawn Newton, Esq. for Plaintiff Maria Dolores McKinney, also present, was sworn & examined.
Stephen Fishback, Esq. is also present.
After considering the written stipulation of the parties and hearing the evidence presented,
the Court grants and ordered the distribution of the settlement funds as requested.
The heirs of decedent Richard McKinney are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds. Maria Dolores McKinney is entitled to 65% and 35% to be divided by the 5 surviving adults children. The Court further ordered that the signature of Maria Dolores McKinney and Vicki Lorraine McKinney shall be sufficient on all settlement documents.
Counsel to prepare ORDER.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order Granting Deft'S Motion To Expedited Summary Judgment, Pursuant To Ccp 473 (B); Memorandum Of P/A; Declarations In Support
Off Calendar Dec-12-2003 Granted Per Written Order

Notice For Apportionment Proceeding And Order To Distribute Settlement Funds;
Off Calendar Nov-07-2003 Continued To Jan-13-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Apportionment and Distribution of Settlement Funds hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Appearances:
Jamie M. Davenport, Esq. (L/O Paul, Hanley & Harley) for Plaintiffs' and Dawn Newton (L/O Fitzgerald Abbott & Beardsley) also for Plaintiff Maria McKinney (not present). Three of the five adult children, Barbara McKinney, Vicki McKinney and Raymond McKinney also appeared and were sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court continues the matter to JAN-13-2004 at 9:00 AM in Dept 218 for interested parties to obtain legal representation. All responsive papers are due Jan. 9, 2004.
Contact information is as follows:
Barbara McKinney - General Delivery, Redding, CA 96049 Phone # (530) 221-4056
Vicki McKinney - P.O. Box 20392, Castro Valley, CA 94546 Phone # (510) 209-8850 or
(510) 728-0146
Raymond McKinney, Geraldine Stimson and Linda McKinney can be contacted through
the address and phone numbers of Vicki McKinney.

THIS CASE IS CONSOLIDATED WITH #312444.
